DotNetTypeConstraints Properties

One Identity Manager API Server

The DotNetTypeConstraints type exposes the following members.

Properties
  NameDescription
ByteMaxValue
The maximum value allowed for Byte (ValType.Byte) values.
ByteMinValue
The minimum value allowed for Byte (ValType.Byte) values.
DateTimeMaxValue
The maximum value allowed for DateTime (ValType.Date) values.
DateTimeMinValue
The minimum value allowed for DateTime (ValType.Date) values.
DecimalMaxValue
The maximum value allowed for Decimal (ValType.Decimal) values.
DecimalMinValue
The minimum value allowed for Decimal (ValType.Decimal) values.
DoubleMaxValue
The maximum value allowed for Double (ValType.Double) values.
DoubleMinValue
The minimum value allowed for Double (ValType.Double) values.
IntMaxValue
The maximum value allowed for Int32 (ValType.Int) values.
IntMinValue
The minimum value allowed for Int32 (ValType.Int) values.
LongMaxValue
The maximum value allowed for Int64 (ValType.Long) values.
LongMinValue
The minimum value allowed for Int64 (ValType.Long) values.
ShortMaxValue
The maximum value allowed for Int16 (ValType.Short) values.
ShortMinValue
The minimum value allowed for Int16 (ValType.Short) values.
